155331211.content:
"Bye, I'll male sure I take care of him", Ben said to Jimmy's parents. They asked him to babysit Jimmy earlier. "So, wanna watch a movie?" asked Ben, "Yeah!" said Jimmy. He grabbed some food to eat while watching.

As he was munching away at the chips, he unconsciously went down and hefted his new-found paunch. It wasn't much, maybe 10 or 20 pounds, but it really showed on Jimmy's lean body. Because many alien threats have deceased more now, Ben has some time to relax. 'What would it be like to get even bigger?" Jimmy thought to himself. "All I can die is stuff myself!" Jimmy grabbed the phone and began calling every takeout place in the area while Ben was asleep.

Later, after all the food had arrived, Jimmy carried the food to the table next to the couch.. On the table were three large pizzas, 5 boxes of Chinese, 10 hamburgers, 15 buckets of fried chicken, and one five-pound piece of steak. Jimmy quickly ate the Chinese, and began working his way through the pizzas. Once he finished the first, he had to remove his shirt because it was constricting his stomach. Jimmy looked down between slices and saw that his paunch had grown into a full-blown belly. He finished the last pizza and leaned back on the couch. He brought the plate with the steak on it to rest on the crown of his belly. He took the steak in both hands and dug in with reckless abandon. Once all five pounds of steak were resting comfortably in his belly, he shoved the hamburgers one by one, and when he was done, he ate the chicken with many sauces he ordered. By the time he was done, he got some chips, ice-cream, and cookies. He put the cookies and mixed it with the ice cream, while he ate the chips. By the time he was done, he gained 10 lbs when he got on the scale "That's a record, I can do 10 lbs a day", said Jimmy. "Well I'm tired", he said. He soon went back to sleep.
